title: rubus × capitatus
intro: Rubus × capitatus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry rose, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragrant raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties due to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × capitatus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary products due to its sweet and fragrant flavor.
